---
title: Place Vendôme Paris
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784794106/placeparis_dblprl.png
description: Place Vendôme Paris, cours savoir dessiner
categories: ["urbansketching"]
date: 2023/04/20
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784794106/placeparis_dblprl.png)


::: {.visually-hidden}
{{< meta description >}}
:::
